THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT GENE R. FERNANDEZ JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INDICATED THAT HIS LAST COMMUNICATION WITH PLAINTIFF WAS THAT THIS MATTER HAS SETTLED. PER C.C.P. 583.310 AND 583.630, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF BRINGING THE MATTER TO TRIAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G.
